name: io.github.svnscha/mcp-windbg
title: MCP Server for WinDbg Crash Analysis
description: A Model Context Protocol server for Windows crash dump analysis using WinDbg/CDB

environmentVariables.description: Symbol path for Windows debugging (optional, defaults to Microsoft symbol server)
environmentVariables.name: _NT_SYMBOL_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Symbol path for Windows debugging (optional, defaults to Microsoft symbol server)
environmentVariables.name: _NT_SYMBOL_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Directory used for temporary uploaded dump storage when using streamable-http upload sessions
environmentVariables.name: WINDBG_UPLOAD_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Maximum upload size in megabytes for streamable-http dump uploads
environmentVariables.name: WINDBG_MAX_UPLOAD_MB

environmentVariables.description: Time-to-live in seconds for inactive upload sessions
environmentVariables.name: WINDBG_SESSION_TTL_SECONDS

environmentVariables.description: Maximum number of active upload sessions
environmentVariables.name: WINDBG_MAX_ACTIVE_SESSIONS
